change_boundary.what_changed: Admitted AAES-OS v1.0 formal spec under docs/contracts/, Python reference implementation under src/aaes_os/, tests/test_aaes_os_v1.py, and lawbook/governance index links.
change_boundary.why_changed: User RFC requires normative governed-span trace model with invariants, trace bus, and deterministic reconstruction for AAIS standalone productization.
assumptions: Operator decision ledger remains canonical for operator accountability; AAES-OS is a span primitive bridge target.
v1 reference uses in-memory trace bus; production persistence is a follow-on.
change_boundary.reversal: Remove docs/contracts/AAES_OS_V1_FORMAL_SPEC.md, src/aaes_os/, tests/test_aaes_os_v1.py, index links, and this manifest.

uncertainty.resolution_path: Escalate bridge design to operator_decision_ledger if span events must become production-persistent before runtime wiring.
